add_action.doc: Log time spent on a promise for an activity the user has ALREADY completed.

add_checkin.doc: Record a yes/no check-in for a count-based promise. Use 'I did it today'-style messages.

add_plan_session.doc: Schedule a FUTURE work session (time block) tied to an existing promise.

add_promise.doc: Create an ongoing tracked goal the user wants to measure over time.

cancel_reminder.doc: Cancel (disable) a recurring reminder by its reminder_id.

clear_profile_pending_question.doc: Clear the pending profile question (call after user answers it).

count_actions_on_date.doc: Count logged actions on a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD) based on actions.csv.

count_actions_today.doc: Count actions for 'today' in the user's timezone from settings.

count_promises.doc: Get total number of promises for a user.

create_recurring_reminder.doc: Create a weekly recurring reminder ping for a promise.

create_reminder.doc: Create a one-off reminder for a future date.

create_reminders.doc: Create MULTIPLE one-off reminders in ONE call. Use when the user lists 2+ things to remember.

delete_plan_session.doc: Cancel and delete a scheduled session for a promise.

delete_promise.doc: Delete a promise by id. Always require user confirmation first.

follow_user.doc: Follow another user by their username.

get_actions.doc: Get all actions for a user (legacy format).

get_actions_on_date.doc: Return action rows on a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD).

get_all_hours_total.doc: Get total hours logged across all promises, optionally within a date range.

get_community_stats.doc: Get your community statistics (follower and following counts).

get_db_schema.doc: Get database schema and example queries for query_database tool.

get_last_action_on_promise.doc: Get last action for a promise (legacy format).

get_my_followers.doc: Get list of users who follow you.

get_my_following.doc: Get list of users you follow.

get_overload_status.doc: Check if user is overloaded with too many active promises and suggest reducing scope.

get_plan_sessions.doc: List all scheduled sessions for a promise (planned, done, and skipped).

get_profile_status.doc: Get user profile status: completion, known facts, missing fields, pending question.

get_promise.doc: Get a specific promise by ID.

get_promise_hours_total.doc: Get total hours logged for a promise, optionally within a date range.

get_promise_weekly_progress.doc: Get weekly progress for a promise.

get_promises.doc: List the user's promises with id, text, tracking ('time'|'count') and status ('active'|'expired'). Use to look up promise_ids.

get_setting.doc: Get a single user setting value by key (timezone, nightly_hh, nightly_mm, language, voice_mode).

get_settings.doc: Get user settings as a dict (timezone, nightly time, language, voice mode).

get_template.doc: Get details for a specific template.

get_tool_help.doc: Get detailed documentation for a specific tool.

get_upcoming_sessions.doc: Get all planned sessions across all promises for the next N days (default 7).

get_weekly_breakdown.doc: Structured weekly activity per active promise: check-ins for habits and hours for time goals (not a target percentage). Prefer this over get_weekly_report for analysis.

get_weekly_report.doc: Get the user's weekly progress report (hours logged vs promised per goal).

get_weekly_visualization.doc: Generate weekly visualization image for a user.

get_work_hour_suggestion.doc: Get work hour suggestion based on user patterns.

list_actions_filtered.doc: Get list of actions with optional filtering by promise and date range.

list_templates.doc: List available promise templates, optionally filtered by category.

log_completed_activities.doc: Log MULTIPLE completed activities in ONE call. Use when the user reports 2+ done things.

log_completed_activity.doc: Log time spent on a promise for an activity the user has ALREADY completed.

log_distraction.doc: Log a distraction event (for budget templates).

mark_session_done.doc: Mark a scheduled session as completed.

mark_session_skipped.doc: Mark a scheduled session as skipped (no time logged).

maybe_ask_profile_question.doc: Check if we should ask a profile question and enqueue it if eligible.

open_mini_app.doc: Open the mini app for the user.

process_shared_link.doc: Process a shared link and return formatted summary with time estimate.

query_database.doc: Execute a read-only SQL query against your data for complex analytics.

resolve_datetime.doc: Resolve a date/time phrase ('tomorrow 3pm') to ISO; translate non-English idioms first.

schedule_session.doc: Schedule a FUTURE work session (time block) tied to an existing promise.

schedule_sessions.doc: Schedule MULTIPLE future sessions in ONE call. Use when the user lists 2+ activities to plan.

search_promises.doc: Find a user's promise_id by free-text query. Use when promise_id is unknown.

set_language.doc: Set the user's preferred reply language.

set_llm_handler.doc: Set LLM handler for content management and time estimation services.

set_timezone.doc: Set the user's timezone (affects all date/time interpretation).

subscribe_template.doc: Subscribe to a template (creates a promise and instance).

unfollow_user.doc: Unfollow a user by their username.

update_plan_session_status.doc: Mark a planned session as done, skipped, or back to planned.

update_promise.doc: Update an existing promise's text, hours/week, recurrence, or dates (only sets fields you pass).

update_setting.doc: Update a low-level user setting by key/value. Prefer set_language or set_timezone.

upsert_profile_fact.doc: Upsert a profile fact (e.g., status, schedule_type, primary_goal_1y, top_focus_area, main_constraint).
